channel.title: API Security on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in API Security on Classroom

item.title: OAuth 2.0 & OpenID Connect Attacks - Practitioner Guide
item.description: OAuth and OIDC sit at the seam between authentication and authorization — and that seam leaks. This guide covers the practitioner-level attacks, with concrete redirect_uri bypass walkthroughs. Companion to my JWT & Authentication Attacks and Access Control posts.

item.title: JWT & Authentication Attacks - Practitioner Guide
item.description: Authentication is who you are; authorization is what you may do. Break the first and the second is moot. This practitioner guide covers JWT attacks plus the broader authentication weaknesses they sit alongside — the companion to my Broken Access Control and API Access Control posts.

item.title: API Access Control: BOLA, BFLA & BOPLA - Practitioner Guide
item.description: Access control is the dominant theme of the OWASP API Security Top 10 — three of the ten are authorization failures: API1 BOLA, API3 BOPLA, and API5 BFLA. APIs are where broken access control hides best: no UI to constrain you, predictable resource paths, and back-ends that often trust the client far too much. This is the practitioner companion to my Broken Access Control guide.
